stemHtml:
You receive the following plain text description within a NOTAM.

GPS (INCLUDING EGNOS, GBAS, AND ADSB) MAY BE UNAVAILABLE WITHIN A 400 NM RADIUS CENTERED AT LBPR (42°15'29''N 027°42'12''W) FL400-UNL DECREASING IN AREA WITH A DECREASE IN ALTITUDE DEFINED AS:

344 NM RADIUS AT FL250
253 NM RADIUS AT FL100
198 NM RADIUS AT 4000 FT AGL
175 NM RADIUS AT 50 FT AGL
EFFECTIVE DAILY 2000-2359 FROM 17/03 UNTIL 21/03

What does this mean?

options.a: GNSS may be unavailable daily between 2000z and 2359z within a radius of 334 NM of LBPR at all levels.
options.b: GBAS will be unavailable at LBPR, however GNSS will still be available between 2000z and 2359z daily.
options.c: GNSS will sometimes be unavailable between 2000z and 2359z at all levels when within 175 NM of LBPR.
options.d: GPS, LPV and ADSB are permanently unavailable at LBPR.
